watches.label: GW / Black-hole perturbation
deprioritize: generic black-hole thermodynamics without perturbation or observational consequences
formal theory papers with no black-hole, gravitational-wave, or observational hook
cosmology papers unrelated to strong gravity or gravitational waves
notes: Reward papers that connect formal calculations to signals, waveforms, or data analysis.

watches.label: Beyond GR / quantum signatures
prioritize: quantum signatures in black-hole ringdown or inspiral
echoes, hair, superradiance, or beyond-Kerr phenomenology
deprioritize: formal model building with no measurable signal
generic cosmology not tied to compact objects or waves
notes: Prefer papers that change spectra, waveforms, or detection prospects.
Theory-only work is fine if it clearly impacts observables.
